arts.ttl: Milan to attempt January move for Santiago Gimenez
arts.sum: Serie A giants Napoli are now likely to attempt a January move for Feyenoord striker Santiago Gimenez. Luca Bianchin has reported today that Milan had tried to sign the Mexican…

arts.ttl: 10 Champions League talking points as Liverpool eye history and Jurgen Klopp wants revenge
arts.sum: The Champions League returns on Tuesday after more than a month, with Liverpool currently leading the way and Manchester City at risk of missing out on the knockout stages

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Kyle Walker travelling to 'formalise' AC Milan move with defender set to undergo medical
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Kyle Walker is reportedly flying to Italy to finalise his move to Serie A giants AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker expected in Italy on Tuesday ahead of move from Man City to AC Milan - after agreeing two-and-a-half year deal with Serie A giants
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The 34-year-old has been negotiating to leave City on a free ahead of agreeing a two and a half year deal with the Serie A side.

arts.ttl: AC Milan Target Alan Varela to Strengthen Midfield for the Summer
arts.sum: AC Milan are focusing on both their current performance and future prospects as they eye potential summer signings. One of the key targets for the upcoming transfer window is Alan Varela, a promising midfielder from Porto. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the Argentine player has caught the attention of Milan’s management and head coach Sergio Conceição, who values his contributions on the field. Varela has had a notable season, participating in 16 league matches and five in the Europa League, showcasing his skills by scoring three goals and providing two assists across 43 games under Conceição.
